title: San Andres Yacht Charter: Costs, Boats & What to Know in 2026
html:
San Andres, the Colombian Caribbean island ringed by the Seaflower Biosphere Reserve, offers exceptional yacht charter opportunities. Departing from the main pier at San Andres Town, a half-day motorboat rental for six starts around €320, and you can compare options on BoatHire24.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in San Andres?

Prices for bareboat or crewed charters range from €80 per person for a shared tour to over €15,000 per week for a luxury motor yacht. The final rate depends on boat size, season, and onboard services.

For an overview of available vessels, browse yacht charter San Andres listings to compare prices and specifications directly from owners.

Where to set off in San Andres

The main departure point is the public dock at San Andres Town, near the cruise terminal. Several marinas and piers serve private charters, including Club Náutico San Andrés, which has berths for yachts up to 30 metres. Other popular launch points are the jetty at Spratt Bight beach and the small pier at San Luis, on the east coast. For trips to the outer cays, such as Johnny Cay and Haynes Cay, boats often leave from the north end of the island near Punta Norte. Acuario Natural, a sandbank reachable in 15 minutes, is a favourite for swimming and snorkelling.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small motorboat (40, 60 hp), ideal for couples or small groups to explore nearby cays; carries 4, 6 passengers; from €150 half-day.
  2. Catamaran (40, 50 ft), stable platform for day charters with up to 12 guests; from €800 full-day.
  3. Crewed motor yacht (12, 20 m), spacious cabins and flybridge for overnight trips; sleeps 6, 8; from €2,500 per day.
  4. Luxury superyacht (26 m+), full crew, jacuzzi, and water toys, such as the Maiora 26m listing; from €4,000 per day.

Cost breakdown for San Andres boat hire

  • Shared snorkelling tour (3 hours): €80 per person, includes guide and equipment.
  • Private small motorboat half-day (4 hours): €320 for up to 6 passengers.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): €1,200 for up to 12 guests, with drinks and snacks.
  • Fully crewed yacht week (7 nights): €12,000, €18,000 for 6, 8 guests, all-inclusive.

When to visit and do you need a licence?

The high season runs from December to April and July to August, when the trade winds blow steadily from the east. During these months, sea conditions are calm along the leeward coast, and visibility for snorkelling is excellent.

No formal boating licence is required to charter a crewed vessel, but for bareboat rentals the operator will confirm your experience. Most San Andres companies require at least basic navigation knowledge or proof of a recognised ICC equivalent.

For the smoothest sailing, book a morning departure from Club Náutico; the easterly wind picks up after midday, making the return to harbour a bumpy ride.

At a glance

  • Price band (per day): €150, €4,000
  • Peak months: December, April, July, August
  • Typical trip length: 4 hours to 7 days
  • Max passengers on day charters: 12
  • Currency used: EUR (prices quoted in euro by most charter platforms)

Questions about boat rental in San Andres

Can I visit the nearby cays from San Andres Town?

Yes, Johnny Cay and Haynes Cay are both reachable in 15, 20 minutes by small motorboat, and day charters often include stops at Acuario Natural.

Is it safe to anchor overnight in San Andres waters?

Anchoring overnight is safe in sheltered bays such as San Luis and West View, provided you check the local weather forecast and avoid the main shipping channel.

What fuel costs should I budget for a full-day trip?

For a 40 hp outboard on a half-day, fuel is typically €30, €50; for a 50 ft catamaran with engines, budget €150, €250 per day.

Can I host a party or event on a chartered yacht?

Many crewed yachts accept up to 12 guests for events, but you must confirm with the operator; some restrict loud music after sunset.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in San Andres and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
